creator: pizzamig@freebsd.org
text:
I'm not able to build the package on FreeBSD 10.3

The problem is the unzip utility on 10.3, that is not able to handle the sources zipped file, with the message:

  unzip: skipping non-regular entry 'WORKSPACE'
  [..]

repeated for all entries of the zip file.

A possible workaround is modify the USES=zip to USES=zip:infozip
that forces /usr/local/lib/unzip to be used to extract the sources zip.

Can you please check the build of the package on FreeBSD 10.3?

Thanks in advance
